mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id, title, start_date, end_date, created_at, updated_at FROM trip WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM post WHERE trip_id = #{tripId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trip (member_id, title, start_date, end_date) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{title}, #{startDate}, #{endDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE trip SET title = #{title}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
